channel.title: tutorial on Sean
channel.description: Recent content in tutorial on Sean

item.title: Lets make a map in R
item.description: There’s a lot of really great posts on mapping in R. This one from the Trafford Data Lab is the one I used when I was starting out in R, and is the post I recommend to anyone interested in making maps with R. Most posts use ggplot2 to make maps. Here, we’re going to use the tmap package. tmap makes thematic maps - which is a fancy way of saying ‘plotting data on a map’.
